## Summary

- describe the task clearly
- keep implementation in the root app, not `quest-companion`

## Canonical Docs

- [ ] `docs/to_dos.md` updated

- [ ] `docs/environment.md` or `docs/local_docker.md` updated if env or local runtime assumptions changed

## Verification

- [ ] relevant validation command(s) run
- [ ] no new product implementation was added under `quest-companion/`
